narrative:
Blue Ash 5-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,107 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
